author: RaintDM
description: MH Weapons — Amellwind Format by RaintDM

weapons.name: GreatSword
entries: A slow, heavy weapon with massive damage potential, the Greatsword is the heavy artillery of melee weapons. While simple at first, the Greatsword requires skilled timing and spacing in order to get the most out of it. On offense, the Greatsword attacks with slow, ponderous swings that hit with precision and accuracy.

rows: Charged Slash Upgrade I, Guard Upgrade I (GS)
Charged Slash Upgrade II, Guard Upgrade II (GS)

customFeatures.name: Charged Slash
customFeatures.description:
As part of the Attack action or when you make an opportunity attack you can forgo an attack with this weapon in order to grant the weapon 1 charge (3 max). Charges are lost if not used within 1 minute.

When you make an attack roll while the weapon has any charges, all charges are expended and that attack is made with advantage; you can forgo this advantage and all other advantages you gain on this turn to gain 1 extra charge to expend on this attack.

On hit the weapon deals an extra 2d6 + (two times proficiency bonus) + your Strength modifier as weapon damage + the weapon's extra damage material (if it has one) for each charge expended in this way, plus an extra 3 damage if you expended 2 charges, or 6 damage if you expended 3 charges.

customFeatures.name: Guard (GS)
customFeatures.description: As a reaction, you add 2 AC against one melee attack that would hit you. To do so, you must see the attacker and be wielding the greatsword. You have disadvantage on attacks until the end of your next turn.

customFeatures.name: Charged Slash Upgrade I
customFeatures.description: Your charged slash now deals an extra 2d8 + (two times proficiency bonus) + your Strength modifier as weapon damage + the weapon's extra damage material (if it has one) for each charge expended in this way, plus an extra 3 damage if you expended 2 charges, or 6 damage if you expended 3 charges.

customFeatures.name: Guard Upgrade I (GS)
customFeatures.description: You now gain a +3 bonus to your AC when you use guard.

customFeatures.name: Charged Slash Upgrade II
customFeatures.description: Your charged slash now deals an extra 2d10 +  + (two times proficiency bonus) + your Strength modifier as weapon damage + the weapon's extra damage material (if it has one) for each charge expended in this way, plus an extra 3 damage if you expended 2 charges, or 6 damage if you expended 3 charges.

customFeatures.name: Guard Upgrade II (GS)
customFeatures.description: You now gain a +4 bonus to your AC when you use guard.
